title: The Fear of God Produces Obedience
reading:
Abraham demonstrated fear of God through obedience. When Abraham was willing to offer Isaac, God said: "Now I know that you fear God."

The fear of God is proven not by words but by actions. Many profess faith. Few obey when obedience costs something.

Biblical fear trusts God enough to surrender personal desires, plans, and comforts. Obedience is reverence in action.
reflection:
Is there an area where God is calling you to obey?

What is preventing complete surrender?

How does obedience reveal trust?
abide: Father, help me obey You completely, even when I do not understand Your plans.
